name: io.github.kandikandikandi/behavioral-audit
title: Agentic Diaries Audit
description: Checks what a support agent knew but did not say against its policies. One hosted tool, disclosure_check: given the customer's message and the draft reply, it flags any should-know policy the situation made relevant that the draft failed to surface, and returns a pass or gap verdict with the line that should have been there. It detects and suggests; it does not rewrite, send anything, or keep the message beyond the check. Free tier, no login.
